# UX Checklist: Return a Low/High Range

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for range display.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/014-low-high-range/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are user-visible outcomes specified for success, range unavailable, range adjusted, and reduced reliability warnings? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for range labels, disclaimers, and proximity to point estimate? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are formatting rules for low/high bounds specified clearly for UI display? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Are warning messages specified clearly for range-unavailable, range-adjusted, and reduced-reliability? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do functional requirements and acceptance scenarios align on range display and disclaimers? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK006 Are accessibility requirements defined for range display and warnings? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
